title: piper evonymifolium
intro: Piper evonymifolium, also known as Long Pepper Vine or Piper, is a plant species in the pepper family, Piperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties due to the presence of piperine, a bioactive compound. The health benefits of Piper evonymifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Piper evonymifolium is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with some herbal preparations also including it as a constituent in capsules or tinctures.
